hero.name: Beatriz Sarmento
hero.title: Web Developer
hero.summary: Web Developer with 3 years of experience building responsive, high-performance web applications using modern technologies like React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript.

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: I am a web developer with a deep passion for creating meaningful digital experiences. Based in Brasilia, Brazil, my journey in technology has been shaped by a curiosity that took me across continents — from engineering studies at the University of Brasilia to exchange programs in the United States and France.
about.p2: At Montgomery College in Maryland, I maintained a perfect 4.0 GPA, and at Télécom Physique Strasbourg in France, I immersed myself in the intersection of engineering and innovation. These international experiences gave me not only technical depth, but a global perspective on how technology can connect and empower people.
about.p3: I am passionate about building scalable, user-focused solutions — systems that are not only functional but genuinely delightful to use. Whether collaborating in agile teams or leading projects, I bring a blend of technical rigor, creative problem-solving, and an unwavering commitment to quality.

items.note: Multiple real-world projects using React, Node.js, and MongoDB

bullets: Designed and developed high-performance corporate portals using Liferay and React, ensuring scalability and maintainability.
Implemented responsive, user-focused interfaces, increasing user engagement across multiple products.
Supervising and currently responsible for four concurrent projects, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality standards.
Collaborated with senior developers to build scalable front-end architectures and improve overall code quality.
Supported the enhancement of enterprise websites within an Agile Scrum environment.
Contributed to the development and launch of new pages, improving site performance and user experience.
Participated in daily stand-ups and sprint reviews to maintain delivery alignment and team efficiency.
Collaborated on front-end features using modern JavaScript frameworks.
Developed and maintained automated testing frameworks to streamline quality assurance processes and reduce testing time.
Supported continuous improvement of build and deployment pipelines, enhancing delivery speed and reliability.
Contributed to the testing lifecycle across multiple government systems, ensuring compliance and stability.

contact.heading: Let's Connect
contact.description: I am always excited to discuss new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of an amazing team. Feel free to reach out.
